methods.description: Process for identifying sampling sites and collecting water quality and diatom data at specified times, noting environmental conditions.

steps.description: Thirty three sites were identified in the Groot Marico and Molopo River systems for the study (Fig. 1).
steps.searchable_summary: Define geographical sampling locations for environmental monitoring

steps.description: Samples were collected... at the sites...
steps.searchable_summary: Collect environmental samples (water quality, biological) at defined locations
inputs: Measurement protocols for water quality and diatoms

steps.description: Samples were collected in April, June, September and November 2005 at the sites...
steps.searchable_summary: Specify sampling schedule and timing for data collection
outputs: Data collected with associated timestamps/sampling events

steps.description: ...as water levels permitted (at times certain samples could not be collected due to low water levels), resulting in a total of 102 separate data points with diatom data and same-day water quality data.
steps.searchable_summary: Record environmental conditions affecting data collection success and report total data points collected
outputs: Metadata on sampling conditions (e.g., missing data points due to low water)
Final count of collected data points (102)

methods.description: Procedures for analyzing collected water quality and biological data using multiple regressions, correlation analysis, and principle component analysis, including data standardization and handling multicollinearity.

steps.description: Before analysis, all the data were standardised by subtracting the sample mean and dividing the result by the sample standard deviation (Hair et al., 1998).
Multiple regressions... were performed using the STATISTICA software package... For the regressions the forward stepwise method was chosen...
steps.searchable_summary: Perform multiple linear regression with forward stepwise feature selection
inputs: Standardized dataset (excluding variables identified for exclusion)

steps.description: ...correlation analysis were performed using the STATISTICA software package...
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate pairwise correlation coefficients between variables

steps.description: For the purpose of the multiple regressions the Electrical Conductivity and Total Alkalinity were left out of the analysis as these variables contributed to multi-colinearity in the data...
steps.searchable_summary: Remove specific variables from a dataset for regression analysis based on multicollinearity
inputs: Variables identified for exclusion (Electrical Conductivity, Total Alkalinity)
Correlation analysis results (used to identify multicollinearity)

steps.description: The R 2 value was used, instead of the R value, as it is a stricter measure of the predictability of multiple regression.
steps.searchable_summary: Report R-squared as the primary metric for evaluating multiple regression model fit
outputs: R^2 value for each regression model

steps.description: ...principle component analysis (PCA) was performed using CANOCO for Windows...
